name: Tibia Fracture (Geometry)
pi: Annchristin Andres, Michael Roland, Stefan Diebels
description: Patient-specific tibia mesh: tibial shaft non-union treated by intramedullary nail diameter change. Three regions: bone, fracture/callus zone, and implant screws.
spp_project: Evidence-based personalized rehabilitation protocols for uneventful healing with data-driven virtual twins
